name: Wood Round Lazy Susan Spice Rack - Threshold™: Revolving Kitchen Organizer, Freestanding Black Wood & Metal
description: Clear up the mess of spice jars in your kitchen with the Wood Round Lazy Susan Spice Rack from Threshold™. Made from metal with a wooden base, this lazy Susan spice rack lets you store and keep a variety of spices at hand to bring efficiency to your everyday cooking chores. Supported on a rotating base, it offers you easy access to the needed ingredient, thus saving time on rummaging through cabinets. In a black metal finish with natural wooden base, this spice rack instantly adds elegant style to your kitchen decor.
